root.name: Change all bullet points on slide 5 to numbered list format
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly converted all bulleted lists on slide 5 to numbered lists, made no extraneous changes, and preserved slide content integrity.

children.name: All bulleted lists on slide 5 are converted to numbered lists
children.description: Checks if every bulleted list on slide 5 is now a numbered list.

children.name: No extraneous changes made to other slides
children.description: Checks that no unintended modifications were made to slides other than slide 5.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    changed_slides = set()
    changed_slides.update(s.slide_number for s in ppt_diff.added_slides)
    changed_slides.update(s.slide_number for s in ppt_diff.removed_slides)
    changed_slides.update(s1.slide_number for (s1, s2) in ppt_diff.modified_slides)
    changed_slides.discard(5)
    if changed_slides:
        return f"Extraneous changes detected on slides: {sorted(list(changed_slides))}", 0.0
    return "No extraneous changes to other slides.", 1.0

children.name: No extraneous formatting changes on slide 5
children.description: Checks that only the list formatting was changed on slide 5, with no unintended formatting changes (e.g., font, color, alignment, etc.).

children.name: Original text content on slide 5 is preserved (except for list formatting)
children.description: Checks that the text content in slide 5 remains unchanged except for bullet-to-number list formatting.

children.name: No extraneous changes to slide transitions or animations
children.description: Checks that transitions and animations were not added, removed, or modified anywhere in the presentation.

metadata.task: Change all bullet points on slide 5 to numbered list format.
